metadata.title:
NORTH COAST IS WRECKED

SEATTLE GETS


FREIGHT LINE

pages.raw_text:
SEATTLE, Feb. Z. - Seattle
wholesale houses have secured a
through freight service daily to
Walla Walla over the line of the
Northern Pacific railway. This
opens new market to the jobbers
of this city.


Protest was made by the Seattle
wholesalers, the freight service
from this city to Walla Walla was
unsatisfactory. 1t was operated
only twice a week, and there was
no through service, Pasco being
made a distributing point. From
Pasco on to Walla Walla the freight
was handled from the same cars
and distributed to the different sta
tons.


The service, which was establish
ed Feb. 1, makes about 4S hours
difference in the time of shipping
from this city to Walla Walla.
